about_item: Perfect Gift for Dog Lovers: Designed with a dual-layer structure, this dog travel bag offers organized space that makes it an ideal choice for dog lovers gifts for women, dog mom gifts for women, dog lover gifts for men, and thoughtful dog gifts for women. The top layer fits toys, leashes, bottles, and daily items, while the bottom holds 2 large food carriers, clothes, or blankets. Great for creating a new puppy gift basket, dog themed gifts, or practical gifts for dog lovers women

Long Trip Friendly Dog Food Carriers Bag: The large travel bag for dogs comes with 2 water-resistant dog food carriers bag, Also includes two silicone collapsible dog bowls with carabiners. The pet travel bag is suitable for dogs of all sizes. and is easy to feed while out

Multiple Functional Pockets: Our dog travel kit has various pockets that can hold different pet supplies, including dog camping essentials, road trip essentials. One side poop bag dispenser, and the other side mesh pocket for water bottles or toys. The front zipper pocket can be fully opened as a feeding mat, 2 inner mesh pockets for storing 2 collapsible dog bowls

Keep All Gears Organized: The dog camping gear with large space to make it convenient to put all dog gear in and keep well organized for your traveling. Whether you are taking your dog on camping, hiking, road trip, or dropping them off at a dog-sitter, you can carry all supplies easily in one travel bags for dogs go, that is a nice gifts for dog owners

Easy Carrying Ways for Travel: The travel dog bag is designed comfortable padded handle strap, an adjustable shoulder strap, and a back luggage belt. Multiple carrying options available. The dog weekend bag is adapted for all outdoor activities with pets, never miss any moment with your furry friends. The pet travel bag is a great present idea for dog moms, dog dad, and dog parents

summary.text: Customers find this pet travel bag convenient for road trips and appreciate its giant food containers that fit a lot of stuff. The bag is well-organized with separate top and bottom compartments, and customers praise its durability, with one mentioning it can hold over two weeks of food supply. They like its appearance and functionality, with one customer noting it works well for emergency situations.

authors_reviews.title: Best travel bag ever!!!!
authors_reviews.text: I love this bag! It held enough food for both of my dogs when we had to board them for 5 days, plus their toys and snacks! Very nice and durable!
authors_reviews.author: Kathleen Srubar

authors_reviews.title: Love this bag - great for traveling
authors_reviews.text: I travel a lot with my dog, over the years we've done a lot of roadtrips and even flights. Now that he's a little older and almost 80lbs, I prefer road-tripping so he can travel comfortably with a big backseat to hangout in. But roadtrips require stopping at hotels and bringing both his and my stuff in. I love this bag for that purpose, the top easily fits his longline leash, an extra collar, shampoo, a full-sized microfiber towel, any meds, some toys, treats, food toppers, and brushes. The bottom portion has two extra large food containers that easily hold over two weeks of food supply. I can also squeeze his food scoop and travel bowl set in the bottom with both containers full of dry kibble.It also has little side pockets, one has an opening for poop bags which is nice and I can also squeeze a thing of bone broth.My only complaint(ish) is the provided food bowls are absolutely tiny. My boy eats about 1.5-2 cups a time and the bowls hold maybe half a cup. I tried taking the bowls out and putting his travel piece in there but unfortunately the front pocket is too small. So I basically don't even use the front pocket.
authors_reviews.author: Paisley

authors_reviews.title: A must have for pet (s)
authors_reviews.text: Love this bag. I use it for a bug out bag for my dog. Plenty big enough. I even bought an emergency kit for him and it fits perfect with room left over in the top compartment. Very study, fits great in the trunk of my car. Wonderful to travel with very sturdy. Money well spent!
authors_reviews.author: 35jrh2

authors_reviews.title: Very nice
authors_reviews.text: I looked at a lot of bags and read a lot of reviews. This one stood out, because the top compartment is separate from the bottom, so you don't have to dig through the top stuff to get to the food and treat containers in the bottom (noted from one of the reviews). Also, the included food containers are very spacious and lined (haven't tested the water proof claim). As another reviewer mentioned, the included collapsible bowls are TINY. Our dogs are large and I don't think their faces could even fit in them. However, I purchased a separate set of larger collapsible bowls for $9.99. They are great, and still fit in the front flap of the bag that the original bowls are stored in. The bag is good looking, and it's nice to have a compact and convenient hold-all for food, toys, treats, leashes, first aid, etc. There's also holders on the side of the bag for water bottles. Very nice to have for road trips.
authors_reviews.author: BaxterH

authors_reviews.title: Durable. Easy to travel with. Convenient when needed. 8/10
authors_reviews.text: I use this at least 2x a month for weekend travel and / or daily adventure days.Basic nice blending color. Great space. Love the top for toys and immediate access to things.Bottom pocket is nice and big with or without cooler sleeves. I usually use one container for food and use the other half of the space for misc items. (1-2 Water bottles, big bones, extra snacks etc)Front pocket is nice and spacious. I leave 2x pop up bowls some wipes, extra bags and a car seat belt. Fits fine.! Only downfall for me !The handle straps are annoying when popping the top and the bottom pieces. Great for travel. Inconvenient for accessibility when moving between pockets. But I’d rather have the feature than not.
authors_reviews.author: Rina

authors_reviews.title: Great travel dog bag - plenty of room!
authors_reviews.text: This was great for our Golden Retriever on a 10 day vaca. Held all her stuff in one place. Plenty of room for her food, toys, treats, allergy pills, leash, travel bowls all, etc. After the trip I washed this in the washing machine on gentle and it held up well. No issues! Glad we purchased this!
authors_reviews.author: M Benedict

authors_reviews.title: Excellent value for traveling
authors_reviews.text: We got this as we travel with our almost 80lb golden retriever. I was looking for a way to keep his stuff organized and this carryall is brilliant. The food storage was enough to pack a weeks worth of food and they were also very easy to clean. I liked how the toy area was separate, so I didn’t have to unpack everything just to get to certain things. There is also a place to have poo bags, which is easily accessible. The water dishes were too small, but I didn’t mind that, we just brought his larger water dishes with us and they fit in his bag. Overall, I would highly recommend for anyone that does a lot of traveling with your furry friend!
authors_reviews.author: Rachel

authors_reviews.title: Great buy
authors_reviews.text: Made very strong. I car travel with my doodle often and it fits everything I need for her.
authors_reviews.author: Cindy Perdue
